summary: Rubikon Center operators conducted FPV anti-drone operations against Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs in the Donbas and Krasny Liman directions on March 6 and 7, 2026, destroying 107 and 88 targets respectively. Their air defense units have intercepted over 1,500 Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs, with 75% belonging to just 11 models, including the Leleka-100, Fury, and Fl. Meanwhile, Lasar’s Group from Ukraine’s National Guard successfully repelled mechanized assaults by the enemy in the Novopavlivka and Dobropillia directions in late January, destroying enemy tanks with support from SOF and adjacent units. Additionally, ZALA Lancet operators demonstrated effective tactics by striking group targets with a single loitering munition despite electronic warfare interference.
